name: Root Beer Cake
recipeIngredient: Root beer (1 cup; do not use diet)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
2. Grease an 8-inch springform pan.
3. Sift together flour, baking soda, and salt; set aside.
4. Boil root beer in a small saucepan until reduced by half to about 6 tablespoons, approximately 5 minutes. Allow it to cool to lukewarm.
5. In a large bowl, beat brown sugar and butter on high speed until light and fluffy, about 2 minutes. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition. Stop the mixer and add reduced root beer and vanilla; mix just until combined.
6. Fold dry ingredients into batter using a rubber spatula.
7. Pour batter into prepared pan. Bake in preheated oven for 45 to 50 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in center comes out clean. Allow cooling for 5 minutes.
8. For frosting: Poke holes all over the cooled cake with a toothpick and brush with about 3 tablespoons of root beer. Remove sides from pan and allow cake to cool completely.
9. Mix remaining root beer, confectioner's sugar, butter, and vanilla in a small bowl until smooth. Spread frosting over top of cooled cake, allowing it to drip down the side.
